channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: L’AI ha cambiato tutto: ecco perché per i CIO è la tecnologia del decennio
item.description: Nel 2024 le aziende italiane hanno continuato a investire sul digitale e il trend si confermerà nel 2025. Due le grandi priorità: cybersicurezza e intelligenza artificiale.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How (and why) to start using an RSS reader for news again
item.description: Imagine having a single app to keep up with your favorite news sources, YouTube channels, newsletters, and blogs, all in an easy-to-read format with no social media algorithms deciding what you see. That’s the idea behind RSS, a 25-year-old open standard for syndicating content from around the web.
item.dc:creator: Jared Newman, Fast Company

item.title: Open source software is now a multi-billion dollar industry
item.description: Open source software is worth $7.7 billion annually, and many companies are keen to invest in the industry.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The exciting new world of Redis
item.description: If you’re a developer who wants the most feature-rich, high-performance version of Redis, your choice is clear: Redis and not a fork. If you have the time and inclination to dabble in ideological debates about open source licensing, well, you might make another choice.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Albania to shut down TikTok for a year over violence, bullying
item.description: Prime Minister Edi Rama, speaking at a meeting with teachers and parents, said TikTok "would be fully closed for all. There will be no TikTok in the Republic of Albania." Rama said the shutdown would begin sometime next year.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: How to empower people through value transformation
item.description: In the business world, transformation has become a buzzword—one that’s often discussed but rarely grounded in clarity. While many focus on digital transformation as a tech-driven revolution, the real conversation should be about value transformation.
item.dc:creator: Natan Linder, Fast Company

item.title: Sweat the small stuff: Data protection in the age of AI
item.description: As concerns about AI security, risk, and compliance continue to escalate, practical solutions remain elusive.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Amazon workers are striking at multiple facilities. Here's what you should know
item.description: Amazon workers affiliated with the Teamsters union continued a strike Friday at seven of the company's delivery hubs just days before Christmas. At midnight on Saturday, workers at a prominent unionized warehouse in New York will also join, the Teamsters said.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: WordPress.org statement threatens possible shutdown for all of 2025
item.description: Automattic CEO Matt Mullenweg on Friday announced a shutdown of almost all services on WordPress.org, the open source project site that’s the home of the software, plugins, and the WordPress community, but was unclear on when the shutdown would end.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Scholz dismisses Musk's assertion that only a far-right party can 'save' Germany
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — Chancellor Olaf Scholz on Friday dismissed an assertion by Elon Musk that only a far-right party can “save Germany,” but said that freedom of opinion "also goes for multibillionaires.” Germany is expected to vote in an early election on Feb.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Amazon workers strike at multiple facilities as Teamsters seek labor contract
item.description: Workers at seven Amazon facilities went on strike Thursday, an effort by the Teamsters union to pressure the e-commerce company for a labor agreement during a key shopping period.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Australian who falsely claimed to have invented bitcoin is found in contempt of UK court
item.description: LONDON (AP) — An Australian computer scientist who falsely claimed to be the founder of the bitcoin cryptocurrency was found Thursday to be in contempt of an order of London's High Court and was sentenced to 12 months in prison, suspended for two years.
item.dc:creator: PAN PYLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Elon Musk considers funding Nigel Farage's populist party, a move that could shake up UK politics
item.description: LONDON (AP) — It’s a photo that sent a tremor through British politics: Elon Musk flanked by British politician Nigel Farage and a wealthy backer, in front of a gilt-framed painting of a young Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: JILL LAWLESS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Apple complains Meta requests risk privacy in spat over EU efforts to widen access to iPhone tech
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple complained that requests from Meta Platforms for access to its operating software threaten user privacy, in a spat fueled by the European Union's intensifying efforts to get the iPhone maker to open up to products from tech rivals.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Go 1.24 brings full support for generic type aliases
item.description: Go 1.24, a planned update to Google‘s popular open-source programming language, has reached the release candidate stage.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Data on animal movements help Hungarian researchers create a swarm of autonomous drones
item.description: BUDAPEST, Hungary (AP) — Moving in a dense cloud, like throngs of people walking across a crowded public square, 100 drones maneuver through the night sky in Hungary's capital, the result of over a decade of research and experimentation that scientists believe could change the future of unmanned fli
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN SPIKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 4 key concepts for Rust beginners
item.description: Few languages are as highly esteemed by developers as Rust, which promises robust memory safety without compromising speed. Rust also has a steep learning curve, though, and some of its programming concepts can feel like a barrier to knowing it well.
item.dc:creator: Info World
